items.title: Scaling Conversational Hungarian ASR: The BEA-Dialogue+ Corpus
items.abstract: Conversational automatic speech recognition in Hungarian is constrained by the limited amount of publicly available dialogue-style training data. The BEA-Dialogue corpus addresses this need, but its strictly speaker-disjoint train/dev/eval split reduces the usable material to only 85 hours. In this paper, we introduce BEA-Dialogue+, an expanded version of the corpus that relaxes the split criterion for experimenters and dialogue partners while preserving complete separation of the primary speakers. This results in 200 hours of transcribed natural conversations and enables a controlled study of the trade-off between additional training data and speaker overlap across the splits. We evaluate several Whisper- and FastConformer-based models on both corpus versions, including Serialized Output Training (SOT)-based fine-tuning for dialogue transcription. Our results show that the larger corpus is more challenging for models without fine-tuning, whereas SOT-based adaptation yields consistent improvements in WER, CER, cpWER, and cpCER. Overall, BEA-Dialogue+ provides a substantially larger yet still demanding benchmark for Hungarian dialogue ASR, and a practical resource for training and evaluating dialogue transcription systems.
items.llm_evidence_en: provides expanded Hungarian ASR corpus for conversational speech
items.llm_evidence_cn: 提供扩展的匈牙利语对话ASR语料库
items.llm_evidence: 提供扩展的匈牙利语对话ASR语料库
items.canonical_evidence: 提供扩展的匈牙利语对话ASR语料库
items.llm_tldr_en: Expands the BEA-Dialogue corpus for Hungarian conversational ASR to 200 hours, enabling study of data-leakage trade-offs and improving Whisper/FastConformer models.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文扩展了匈牙利语对话ASR语料库BEA-Dialogue+，将可用训练数据从85小时增至200小时。通过放宽说话人隔离标准，在保持主要说话人分离的前提下增加了数据量。在Whisper和FastConformer模型上评估，展示了更多数据与说话人重叠之间的权衡。该工作推进了低资源语言ASR的发展。
items.llm_tldr: 该论文扩展了匈牙利语对话ASR语料库BEA-Dialogue+，将可用训练数据从85小时增至200小时。通过放宽说话人隔离标准，在保持主要说话人分离的前提下增加了数据量。在Whisper和FastConformer模型上评估，展示了更多数据与说话人重叠之间的权衡。该工作推进了低资源语言ASR的发展。

items.title: Extracting accent features in spoken Brazilian Portuguese without sociolinguistic labels
items.abstract: Regional accent classification in Brazilian Portuguese (pt-BR) suffers from the need for reliable labeling. While large self-supervised learning (SSL) speech models are powerful, their training pipelines dilute sociophonetic information, since accent labels are generally not reliable or are not used in training objectives. This work introduces a novel workflow for feature extraction using only acoustic labels. By isolating explicit regional accent landmarks and using a phoneme-based forced aligner (ZIPA), our targeted feature set captures dialectal variance more effectively than utterance embeddings, demonstrating that localized features can outperform general-purpose architectures on accent-related tasks using minimal and objective data labels.
items.llm_evidence_en: Accent feature extraction for dialectal speech recognition without sociolinguistic labels
items.llm_evidence_cn: 无需社会语言学标签的方言口音特征提取
items.llm_evidence: 无需社会语言学标签的方言口音特征提取
items.canonical_evidence: 无需社会语言学标签的方言口音特征提取
items.llm_tldr_en: This work introduces a novel workflow to extract regional accent features from Brazilian Portuguese speech using phoneme-based forced alignment and acoustic labels only, outperforming utterance embeddings on accent classification.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 方言口音分类依赖可靠标注，但自监督模型训练中社会语言学信息被稀释。本文提出仅使用声学标签的工作流，通过音素强制对齐器ZIPA隔离显式区域口音标志，提取的目标特征集比全句嵌入更有效地捕获方言变异性。实验证明，该方法在口音分类上超越通用架构，且标注成本低，为方言语音识别提供了高效特征提取方案。
items.llm_tldr: 方言口音分类依赖可靠标注，但自监督模型训练中社会语言学信息被稀释。本文提出仅使用声学标签的工作流，通过音素强制对齐器ZIPA隔离显式区域口音标志，提取的目标特征集比全句嵌入更有效地捕获方言变异性。实验证明，该方法在口音分类上超越通用架构，且标注成本低，为方言语音识别提供了高效特征提取方案。
